entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE

entities.description: The process of distributing water resources among various users.

entities.description: The timing and amount of water applied to crops.

entities.description: Strategies to reduce the impact of climate-related risks.

entities.name: DATE OF SOWING
entities.description: The specific time when seeds are planted by farmers.

entities.name: INITIAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The first rainfall event that triggers sowing decisions.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Local knowledge used by farmers to estimate soil moisture and decide sowing dates.

entities.name: PHYSICAL ESTIMATION
entities.description: Manual or physical methods of measuring soil moisture.

entities.name: BARE AGRICULTURE FIELDS
entities.description: Fields without crop cover used as the study area.

entities.description: Satellite imagery used to estimate surface soil moisture.

entities.description: The geographical region of the study area.
